name: C-19 compliance auto-refresh exits two when --now is omitted per the entry contract
command: printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nexit 0\n' > up.sh && chmod +x up.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --upstream-stub ./up.sh 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'required' err.txt && echo usage 1>&2
